rdf:Description.dc:description: Population-mean horizontal capacity Hmax vs normalised scour depth S/D (manuscript @fig-degradation-curves). Shaded band spans p5-p95 quantiles across 200 LHS realisations per scour stage (PC3 covers S/D = 0.3125, 0.375; PC4 covers S/D = 0.4375, 0.5). Mean drops 13.4% from the shallowest to the deepest stage in the committed subset; CoV stays near 0.27 at every stage.
